# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Rothera picks Adaptive to build CFTC-regulated event contracts exchange](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/rothera-picks-adaptive-to-build-cftc-regulated-event-contracts-exchange.html): Rothera has selected Adaptive's Aeron Exchange Accelerator technology to construct a CFTC-regulated event contracts trading and clearing platform, adding a new entrant to the regulated prediction-market space.
- [Polymarket Embeds in Blockchain.com App, Reaching 43 Million Users](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-embeds-in-blockchain-com-app-reaching-43-million-users.html): Blockchain.com has partnered with Polymarket to integrate prediction-market event contracts directly into its brokerage app, giving Polymarket access to the platform's 43 million registered users.
- [Kalshi, Polymarket Top $50B in June as World Cup Drives Record Volume](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-polymarket-top-50b-in-june-as-world-cup-drives-record-volume.html): Kalshi, Polymarket, and Robinhood's Rothera joint venture collectively surpassed $50 billion in notional trading volume in June 2026, their biggest month ever, fueled by the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
- [Polymarket Signs Crypto Partnership Ahead of World Cup Semifinals](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-signs-crypto-partnership-ahead-of-world-cup-semifinals.html): Polymarket announced a partnership with an unnamed crypto firm timed to the FIFA World Cup semifinals, while simultaneously running a $50 promotional offer for new users via code "OREGON".
- [Michigan extends Kalshi sports contract ban, sets Aug. 12 geofence deadline](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/michigan-extends-kalshi-sports-contract-ban-sets-aug-12-geofence-deadline.html): Michigan regulators have extended their prohibition on Kalshi's sports event contracts and ordered the platform to geofence the state by August 12, giving the company additional time to comply.
- [Kalshi, Polymarket Face Core Legal Question: Gambling or Finance?](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-polymarket-face-core-legal-question-gambling-or-finance.html): Bloomberg Law News examines the central regulatory debate over whether US prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket constitute legal financial instruments or illegal gambling under American law.
- [Cboe Expands Options Hours and Prediction Markets to Diversify Revenue](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/cboe-expands-options-hours-and-prediction-markets-to-diversify-revenue.html): Cboe Global Markets is broadening its business into prediction markets and extended options trading hours, according to a Yahoo Finance analysis examining whether these moves redefine the exchange operator's diversification strategy.
- [Kalshi World Cup odds now surface inside ChatGPT via OpenAI](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-world-cup-odds-now-surface-inside-chatgpt-via-openai.html): OpenAI has begun displaying Kalshi's prediction-market odds for the FIFA World Cup directly within ChatGPT, giving the regulated event-contract exchange a high-visibility distribution channel for the first time.
- [Gondor v1 launches Polymarket portfolio borrowing for prediction-market positions](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/gondor-v1-launches-polymarket-portfolio-borrowing-for-prediction-market-position.html): Gondor v1, a new DeFi protocol, will allow Polymarket users to use their entire prediction-market portfolio as collateral for loans, unlocking liquidity without forcing position exits.
- [Kalshi Home Run Derby market opens with Schwarber as frontrunner](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-home-run-derby-market-opens-with-schwarber-as-frontrunner.html): Kalshi has launched a Home Run Derby prediction market listing Kyle Schwarber as the odds-on favorite to win the 2025 MLB All-Star event.
